When a non-construct creature enters the fog's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that creature must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save a creature takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) poison damage and is {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition poisoned}. Creatures are affected even if they hold their breath or don't need to breathe.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If Malach fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: Malach's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Malach makes two censer attacks.

action.name: Censer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@dice 1d8 + 5}) bludgeoning and 9 ({@damage 2d8}) poison damage.

action.name: Create Miasma
entries: Malach creates a 15-foot-radius sphere of poisonous fog centered on a point within 60 feet of him. The fog spreads around corners. It lasts until the end of Malach's next turn. Its area is heavily obscured for creatures other than Malach. The fog otherwise functions like that of his Deadly Miasma trait.

action.name: Bane of Flesh {@recharge}
entries: Malach chooses a non-construct creature he can see within 15 feet of him and attempts to rip out its flesh with vile magic. The creature must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw or take 27 ({@damage 6d8}) poison damage and 27 ({@damage 6d8}) lightning damage. Creatures within Malach's Deadly Miasma have disadvantage on this saving throw and the weakening miasma causes the damage to ignore damage resistance.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Malach makes one censer attack.

legendary.name: Zealous Path
entries: Malach moves up to his speed. This movement doesn't provoke {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks}.

legendary.name: Miasma (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Malach uses his Create Miasma.

legendary.name: Higher Purpose (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Malach reaches for a higher purpose. This effect changes based on his Angel of Flesh trait.

If above 81 hit points, Malach releases an all-powerful miasma with a 20-foot radius centered on a point 120 feet of him. Each non-construct creature in the area must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition paralyzed} until the end of Malach's next turn. While {@condition paralyzed} in this way, a creature automatically fails its saving throws against Malach's Deadly Miasma.

If at or below 81 hit points, Malach uses his golden form to release a glimmer of sickening light. Each non-construct creature within 120 feet of Malach must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw or take 18 ({@damage 4d8}) radiant damage and become {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute. This ignores immunity to the {@condition poisoned} condition. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

monster.name: Nightgaunt
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak

trait.name: Blank Face
entries: When a creature that can see the nightgaunt start its turn within 5 feet of the nightgaunt or enter that area for the first time on a turn, the creature must succeed on a {@dc 14} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened} of the nightgaunt for 1 minute and gain a {@table short-term madness|SGttEH}. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the {@condition frightened} condition ends for it, the creature is immune to the nightgaunt's Blank Face for the next 24 hours.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The nightgaunt doesn't provoke {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The nightgaunt has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Silent Tormenter
entries: The nightgaunt makes no sound, ever. It has advantage on {@skill Stealth} checks and is automatically hidden from creatures that can't see it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The nightgaunt makes two claw attacks and uses its Tail.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 16}). The nightgaunt has two claws, each of which can {@action grapple} only one target. Until this {@action grapple} ends, the nightgaunt can't use that claw to attack any other creature.

action.name: Tail
entries: The nightgaunt uses its tail in one of the following ways.

action.name: Tail Whip
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 4d4 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Prehensile Tail
entries: The nightgaunt flails its tail towards a creature that it can see within 10 feet of it. The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or be overwhelmed by the pain and be {@condition incapacitated} until the start of the nightgaunt's next turn. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is instead {@condition stunned} until the start of the nightgaunt's next turn, as it loses control of its body. Creatures that have a speed of 0 have disadvantage on this saving throw.

bonus.name: Night Rush
entries: The nightgaunt moves up to half its flying speed.

reaction.name: Feed on Emotions
entries: When a creature within 10 feet of the nightgaunt fails a saving throw against its Blank Face or Prehensile Tail, the nightgaunt can feed on the creature's emotions—fear, anger, surprise—and regains 8 ({@dice 1d10 + 3}) hit points. If a creature fails the saving throw by 5 or more, the nightgaunt regains 14 ({@dice 2d10 + 3}) hit points instead.

trait.name: Abhorrent Presence
entries: When a creature starts its turn within 60 feet of the centipede, the creature must make a {@dc 14} Wisdom saving throw. If the creature has never encountered a centipede before, it gains a {@table long-term madness|SGttEH} on a failure, or a {@table short-term madness|SGttEH} on a success. A creature that has encountered a centipede before gains a {@table short-term madness|SGttEH} on a failure, and no madness on a success.

trait.name: Hive Mind
entries: Nightmare centipedes share a bond with other members of their hive that enhances their abilities. As long as a centipede is within 60 feet of at least one other centipede, it has advantage on initiative rolls and {@skill Perception} checks. If one centipede is aware of a particular danger, all others in the hive are, too. No centipede in a hive mind is surprised at the beginning of an encounter unless all of them are. In addition, a centipede gains a bonus to attack and damage rolls equal to the number of centipedes within 60 feet of it (maximum +5).

trait.name: Otherworldly Communication
entries: The centipede can communicate via subsonic sounds with other aberrations, aquatic creatures with 6 or less Intelligence, and insects within 60 feet of it. This is a silent and instantaneous mode of communication that the other creatures can understand. As a bonus action, the centipede can use this trait to control and give orders to one creature or swarm of creatures (e.g. a {@creature swarm of insects}) of CR 1 or lower that understands it within 60 feet of it.

trait.name: Inexorable Movement
entries: When the centipede moves into the space of a creature that is Large or smaller, the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} {@skill Athletics} or {@skill Acrobatics} check (creature's choice) or become {@condition grappled} by the centipede. The centipede can {@action grapple} up to 100 creatures and its speed isn't halved by {@action grapple|PHB|grappling} creatures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The centipede makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its pincers.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) piercing damage and 6 ({@damage 1d12}) poison damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute. A {@condition poisoned} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) slashing damage and 3 ({@damage 1d6}) poison damage. The centipede has advantage on the attack roll if it is {@action grapple|PHB|grappling} the target.

bonus.name: Crawl
entries: The centipede moves up to its speed.

reaction.name: Regurgitate {@recharge 5}
entries: After being hit by an attack, the centipede exhales a stream of acidic ichor in a 40-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 13} Dexterity saving throw, taking 26 ({@damage 4d12}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

immune.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Orr's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
footerEntries: * Orr always succeeds on the saving throw for this spell

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: Orr can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Cold Absorption
entries: Whenever Orr is subjected to cold damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hit points equal to the cold damage dealt.

trait.name: Divine Rejuvenation
entries: When Orr drops to 0 hit points, its body collapses into a writhing mass of flesh, whereupon Orr instantly reappears in its {@creature Orr, The Grieving Rebirth (Second Form)|SGttEH|second form} in an unoccupied space within 60 feet of where its first form was destroyed. Its initiative count doesn't change.

trait.name: Freedom of Movement
entries: Orr ignores {@quickref difficult terrain||3}, and magical effects can't reduce its speed or cause it to be {@condition restrained}. It can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or being {@condition grappled}.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: Orr is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If Orr fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: Orr's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Orr makes two tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 12} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) slashing damage and 13 ({@damage 2d12}) cold damage. If a creature is damaged by this attack twice before the start of Orr's next turn, it must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw or gain one level of {@condition exhaustion}.

action.name: Scream (3/Day)
entries: Orr emits a scream of pure rage and agony. Each time it screams before finishing a long rest, the scream is louder and the effect is different, as detailed below. Each creature within 500 feet of Orr and able to hear the scream must make a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw.

items.name: Scream of Pain
entries: Each creature that fails its save is affected by crippling pain for 1 minute. For the duration, the creature's speeds are reduced to 10 feet and it has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws, other than Constitution saving throws. Further, if the target tries to cast a spell, it must first succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw, or the casting fails and the spell is wasted. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

items.name: Scream Of Harvest
entries: Each creature that fails its save becomes vulnerable to necrotic and cold damage for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

items.name: Scream of Death
entries: Each creature takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) cold damage and 22 ({@damage 4d10}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful save.

bonus.name: Teleport
entries: Orr magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space.

reaction.name: Warp Magic
entries: Orr casts {@spell counterspell} at 5th level.

legendary.name: Tentacle Attack
entries: Orr makes one tentacle attack.

legendary.name: Teleport (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Orr uses Teleport.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Orr casts a spell from its Innate Spellcasting trait, expending a use as normal.

immune.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Orr's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 22}, {@hit 14} to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: Orr can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Black Frost Shell
entries: Orr starts with 50 temporary hit points. If a creature hits it with a melee attack while it has these hit points, the creature takes 50 cold damage.

trait.name: Freedom of Movement
entries: Orr ignores difficult terrain, and magical effects can't reduce its speed or cause it to be {@condition restrained}. It can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or being {@condition grappled}.

trait.name: Gravity Bound
entries: Orr is bound by its curse. It can't position itself further than 20 feet away vertically from the ground. If it is moved higher than 20 feet, it immediately begins falling until it is 20 feet above the ground.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Orr fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: Orr's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Orr has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Numbing Frost
entries: If Orr damages a creature twice on a turn, the target must make a {@dc 22} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 17 ({@damage 5d6}) cold damage and is slowed, as per the {@spell slow} spell, for 1 minute. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage and isn't slowed. A slowed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Orr uses its Frozen Rebirth. It then makes three tentacle attacks. It can replace up to two tentacle attacks with one maddening shard attack each.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 12} to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage and 10 ({@damage 3d6}) cold damage, and Orr can push the target up to 30 feet away in a straight line.

action.name: Maddening Shard
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 14} to hit, range 150 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 3d10 + 8}) cold damage, and if the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 22} Wisdom saving throw or gain a short-term madness.

action.name: Frozen Rebirth
entries: Orr summons {@dice 1d4} {@creature Hunter (Frozen)|SGttEH|hunters} {@homebrew |(SSgtEH page 319)} in empty spaces it can see within 120 feet of it. The {@creature Hunter (Frozen)|SGttEH|hunters} are under Orr's control, are immune to cold damage, and gain a +4 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Orr can have no more than five {@creature Hunter (Frozen)|SGttEH|hunters} under its control at one time.

bonus.name: Vanish
entries: Orr explodes in a blast of rime and wind. Each creature within 60 feet of it must make a {@dc 22} Constitution saving throw, taking 17 ({@damage 5d6}) cold damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a success. Creatures touching metal objects (for example, carrying metal weapons or wearing metal armor) automatically fail this saving throw. Orr then reappears in an unoccupied space of its choice that it can see within 120 feet of it.

reaction.name: Devour Magic
entries: When a creature Orr can see within 60 feet of it casts a spell, Orr casts {@spell counterspell} at 5th level. If it successfully counters the magic, it regains hit points equal to three times the spell's level (0 for cantrips).

legendary.name: Tentacle Attack
entries: Orr makes one tentacle attack.

legendary.name: Teleport (Costs 1 Actions)
entries: Orr uses its Vanish.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Orr casts a spell from its Innate Spellcasting trait, expending a use as normal.

trait.name: Keen Sight and Smell
entries: The owlbear has advantage on {@skill Perception} checks that rely on sight or smell.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The owlbear regains 15 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point. If any of its limbs are severed (including tentacle or head), they instead regrow and the owlbear doesn't regain hit points.

trait.name: Fear of Radiance
entries: If the owlbear takes radiant damage, it suffers a −2 penalty to its AC and Dexterity saving throws until the end of its next turn and becomes enraged. While enraged, the owlbear attacks the source of the radiant damage until the target dies, it has advantage on attack rolls against it. Once the owlbear becomes enraged, for the next minute, it continues to attack this target until it or the target dies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The owlbear makes three attacks: two with its tentacles and one with its beak or fanged neck.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Fanged Neck
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) piercing damage. If the target is {@condition grappled} by the owlbear, the attack is a critical hit.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) piercing damage, and the target must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target is impaled by the tentacle and is {@condition grappled} (Escape {@dc 18}) and {@condition restrained} while {@condition grappled} in this way. A tentacle can be cut down, freeing any impaled creatures. The tentacle has the same damage resistances as the owlbear, AC 16, and 20 hit points. Any damage dealt to the tentacle is also dealt to the owlbear, up to a maximum of 20. The Owlbear has two tentacles and can only make a tentacle attack or {@action grapple} with tentacles that haven't been cut down.

bonus.name: Rush
entries: The Owlbear moves up to half its speed.

monster.name: Parasitic Geist

resist.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't moongilded or silvered

languages: any languages it knew in life

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The geist can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@quickref difficult terrain||3}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the geist has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on {@skill Perception} checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Devour Life
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) necrotic damage and the geist attaches to the target. While attached, the geist can't use this attack. Instead, at the start of each of the geist's turns, the target takes 6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) necrotic damage. The geist moves with the target and can detach as a bonus action.

trait.name: Accursed Body
entries: The penitent's body is barely held together. Whenever the penitent takes more than 50 damage, one of its limbs disintegrates into ash (each of its two arms first, then each of its two legs). If the penitent reattaches a lost limb, even if it belonged to a different humanoid, it regains 50 hit points.

trait.name: Cleaving Strikes
entries: When the penitent makes a melee weapon attack, it can make another attack with the same weapon against another creature within 5 feet of the original target and within reach as part of the same attack. If the penitent does so, its speed is halved until the end of its turn.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The penitent's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Mask of Penitence
entries: While wearing its mask, the penitent is {@condition blinded} and immune to madness.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The penitent makes three greatsword attacks. It can use Hands of Punishment in place of one attack.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) slashing damage.

action.name: Hands of Punishment
entries: The penitent destroys one of the limbs in its crucible to summon blasphemous hands. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point that the penitent can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw or take 2 ({@damage 1d4}) psychic damage and be {@condition restrained} by the hands until the end of the penitent's next turn. While {@condition restrained} in this way, corruption seeps within the target and it has disadvantage on Intelligence checks and Intelligence saving throws.

bonus.name: Bloodthirsty Dash
entries: The penitent moves up to its speed towards a hostile creature it can see without provoking {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks}.

bonus.name: Limb Offering
entries: The penitent warps the intellect of a creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or extend one of its limbs forward (the penitent's choice). If the penitent hits the target with a greatsword attack before the end of its turn, the limb is cut clean (see '{@table Losing Limbs|SGttEH}', {@homebrew |page 309 of SGttEH}). The penitent then adds the limb to its crucible.

bonus.name: Reattach Limb (3/Day)
entries: The penitent magically attaches one of the limbs in its crucible to itself or a willing creature within its reach if that creature is missing the limb. The limb is fully functional, and the creature regains any abilities it lost due to the limb being severed. The penitent starts with {@dice 1d4} limbs in its crucible.

reaction.name: Blasphemous Prison
entries: When a creature starts its turn within 5 feet of the penitent, or enters the area for the first time on a turn, the penitent can entrap it in its crucible. The target must succeed on a {@dc 19} Dexterity saving throw or be trapped in the crucible. While trapped, the target is {@condition restrained}, has total cover against effects outside the crucible, and takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage at the start of each of the penitent's turns. A trapped creature, or an ally within reach, can use its action to make a {@dc 19} {@skill Athletics} check, toppling the crucible and freeing the creature on a success.

If toppled, the crucible magically teleports onto the back of the penitent at the end of its next turn. Alternatively, the penitent can recall it as a bonus action. While not carrying the crucible, the penitent can't use its Hands of Punishment, Limb Offering, or Reattach Limb actions.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Watcher's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 20}). The Watcher can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Cosmic Constitution
entries: The Watcher sheds bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for another 15 feet. It can choose to turn this light on or off at any time while it isn't {@condition incapacitated} (no action required). In addition, whenever a creature starts its turn within 30 feet of the Watcher, the creature must succeed on a {@dc 20} Strength saving throw or be pulled 30 feet toward the Watcher.

trait.name: Onyx Flight
entries: When the Watcher is flying up to 15 feet above the ground, it coats the ground beneath it in a thick layer of tar. Each creature except the Watcher that moves into an area coated in this tar must succeed on a {@dc 20} Dexterity saving throw or become tar-coated. A tar-coated creature's speed is halved. Whenever a tar-coated creature takes fire or radiant damage, it explodes and the tar vanishes; each creature within 10 feet of the creature must succeed on a {@dc 20} Dexterity saving throw or take 17 ({@damage 5d6}) fire damage. The tar-coated creature has disadvantage on the saving throw.

trait.name: Spatial Rend
entries: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the Watcher hits with it (included in the attack).

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: The Watcher has a {@item sword of the radiant watcher|SGttEH}, which is permanently in its Shadow Form {@homebrew |(SGttEH page 253)}. The Watcher can't be disarmed of it while it is conscious.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Watcher uses its Starsky Presence, then makes three attacks.

action.name: Sword of the Radiant Watcher
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) slashing damage, or 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Cosmic Bolt
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 12} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) radiant damage.

action.name: Supernova {@recharge}
entries: Focusing its entire strength on one star from its body, the Watcher forms a supernova from within. Each creature within 60 feet of the Watcher must make a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 42 ({@damage 12d6}) radiant damage and is {@condition blinded} for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition blinded}. A {@condition blinded} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Starsky Presence
entries: The Watcher forces those around it to gaze into the void of the cosmos and realize their meaninglessness. Each creature of the Watcher's choice that is within 120 feet of the Watcher and aware of it must succeed on a {@dc 20} Wisdom saving throw or gain a {@table long-term madness|SGttEH} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature gains one {@table short-term madness|SGttEH} and is otherwise immune to the Watcher's Starsky Presence for the next 24 hours.

bonus.name: Star Drop
entries: The Watcher deals 2 ({@damage 1d4}) radiant damage to a creature that it can see within 120 feet of it.

reaction.name: Tar Slew
entries: When the Watcher is hit by an attack, it can explode in a wave of tar. Each creature within 10 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 20} Dexterity saving throw or become tar-coated per the Watcher's Onyx Flight trait.

legendary.name: Fly
entries: The Watcher flies up to its speed.

legendary.name: Strike
entries: The Watcher makes one attack.

monster.name: Razorblade Bitzer
languages: understands the languages of its master(s) but can't speak

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The bitzer sheds bright light in a 5-foot radius and dim light in an additional 5 feet.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The bitzer is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Instilled Loyalty
entries: The bitzer can't act in a manner that is harmful to its master(s).

trait.name: Necrotic Negation (1/Day)
entries: When the bitzer takes necrotic damage, it instead takes no damage.

trait.name: Whirligig Saw
entries: A creature that the bitzer is {@action grapple|PHB|grappling} takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) slashing damage at the start of each of its turns and the bitzer's turns.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bitzer makes two melee attacks, only one of which can be with its bite

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) piercing damage and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 13}). Until this {@action grapple} ends, the bitzer can't bite another target.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

monster.name: Reflection

items.name: Eldritch Resistance
entries: The reflection has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

items.name: Eldritch Regeneration
entries: The reflection regenerates 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point remaining. If the reflection takes radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The reflection dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

items.name: Maddening Gaze
entries: As an action, the reflection can target the creature it resembles if it can see it and it is within 10 feet. The targeted creature must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or become affected by a {@table short-term madness|SGttEH} effect {@homebrew |(see "Steinhardt's Madness System")}. This effect doesn't count towards gaining {@table long-term madness|SGttEH|long-term} or {@table indefinite madness|SGttEH}. A creature can only be affected by this effect once per 24 hours.

languages: As per the character they resemble

trait.name: Emaciated Appetite
entries: The bear is in a state of constant hunger. After hitting a non-construct creature with an attack, the bear eats part of it, regaining 8 ({@dice 1d10 + 3}) hit points.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The bear can hold its breath for 3 hours.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While motionless and partly submerged in water or acid, the bear is indistinguishable from a normal mound of dirt.

trait.name: Spiked Body
entries: Whenever a creature within 5 feet of the bear hits it with a melee attack, the creature takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bear makes two snapjaw attacks.

action.name: Snapjaw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) piercing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 14}). Until this {@action grapple} ends, the bear can't make snapjaw attacks against another target, and the target takes an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage when it's hit by this attack.

resist.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't moongilded or silvered

trait.name: Protective Instinct
entries: If the hound is not {@condition blinded}, it has advantage on its initiative roll.

trait.name: Crushing Grasp
entries: Creatures the hound is {@action grapple|PHB|grappling} have disadvantage on attack rolls against it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hound makes three attacks, only one of which can be with its bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) piercing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 14}) if it is a Large or smaller creature. The target must also succeed on a {@dc 12} Intelligence saving throw or gain a {@table short-term madness|SGttEH}. Until the {@action grapple} ends, the hound can't bite another target.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 14}) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until the {@action grapple} ends, the hound can't use this tentacle on another target. The hound has five tentacles.

action.name: Eldritch Tethers {@recharge 3}
entries: If the hound isn't {@action grapple|PHB|grappling} any creatures with its tentacles, it can make a tentacle attack against up to five creatures within reach. Each attack must target a separate creature.

trait.name: Dune Predator
entries: Whenever the roaring mane damages a {@condition prone} creature with an attack, the creature's AC is reduced by 1 until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Earthen Pounce
entries: If the roaring mane moves at least 15 feet underground or straight toward a target and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}. If the target is {@condition prone}, the roaring mane can make a bite attack against it as a bonus action.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The roaring mane has advantage on {@skill Perception} checks that rely on hearing or smell.

trait.name: Unwavering Pride
entries: The roaring mane has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The roaring mane makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tectonic Roar {@recharge}
entries: The roaring mane unleashes an earth-shattering roar, sending out a shockwave in a 15-foot cone in front of it. Each creature within the area must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or take 22 ({@damage 4d10}) thunder damage, be knocked {@condition prone}, and have its speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

The roaring mane can use this action while it is burrowed, and if it does so, the ground in the area becomes {@quickref difficult terrain||3} for other creatures for 1 minute. Each 5-foot square of {@quickref difficult terrain||3} can be cleared if a creature spends its action to do so.

trait.name: Guiding Light
entries: The adjudicator sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius. When a creature starts its turn in the light, or enters it for the first time on a turn, it gains disadvantage on Charisma saving throws until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Limited Telepathy
entries: The adjudicator can magically communicate ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with any creature within 120 feet of it. This form of telepathy doesn't allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.

trait.name: Reactive
entries: The adjudicator can take one reaction on every turn in combat.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The adjudicator makes two handaxe attacks.

action.name: Handaxe
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing damage. On a hit, if the adjudicator isn't within 5 feet of the target, the adjudicator can teleport to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target.

action.name: Soul Tear
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 3}) necrotic damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Charisma saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. If this effect reduces a creature's hit point maximum to 0, the creature dies. A creature killed by this reduction can't be resurrected until the adjudicator is killed.

action.name: Inferno {@recharge 4}
entries: Flames pour down from the adjudicator's wings. Each creature between 10 and 40 feet of the adjudicator must make a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 ({@damage 6d6}) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

reaction.name: Snuff Out the Light
entries: When a spell that restores hit points is being cast within 120 feet of the adjudicator, the adjudicator teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the caster and makes a handaxe attack against it with advantage. On a hit, the spell fails and has no effect.

immune.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The scourge lycan has advantage on {@skill Perception} checks that rely on hearing or smell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The scourge lycan makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Devour {@recharge 4}
entries: The scourge lycan attempts to eat a creature within 5 feet of it. The target must make a {@dc 13} Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is crunched by the werewolf, taking 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) piercing damage and falling {@condition prone}. The scourge lycan regains hit points equal to the damage dealt.

trait.name: Disorienting Strikes
entries: The screechwing has advantage on attack rolls against {@condition deafened} creatures.

trait.name: Echolocative Vision
entries: The screechwing can see creatures it has hit with its Echoing Screech attack within the last minute past its {@sense blindsight} range, up to 120 feet, and regardless of cover.

trait.name: Swift Swordsmanship
entries: After the screechwing hits a creature with a weapon attack, the screechwing can take the {@action Disengage} action as a bonus action that turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The screechwing makes two attacks with its shortswords.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Screech {@recharge 4}
entries: The screechwing lets out a powerful screech in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw or take 9 ({@damage 2d8}) thunder damage, become {@condition stunned} until the end of its next turn, and become {@condition deafened} for 1 minute. A {@condition deafened} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

monster.name: Skulking Shade
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak

trait.name: Cull the Herd
entries: The shade has advantage on attack rolls against creatures which are within 5 feet of one of that creature's allies or against creatures that it is {@action grapple|PHB|grappling}.

trait.name: Organ Ripper
entries: Whenever the shade scores a critical hit against a creature with a melee attack, the target takes an additional 11 ({@damage 2d10}) piercing damage. If the attack reduces the target to 0 hit points, the shade rips out a vital organ from the creature (such as the heart or brain), recharges its Death Breath, and the creature dies.

trait.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in dim light or darkness, the shade can take the {@action Hide} action as a bonus action.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The shade makes three melee attacks, only one of which can be with its bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) piercing damage. The shade regains hit points equal to the damage dealt.

action.name: Crush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target {@condition grappled} by the shade. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Snatch
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 16}). The shade can then fly up to its flying speed without provoking {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks}.

action.name: Death Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: The shade exhales a breath of deathly energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw, taking 22 ({@damage 4d10}) necrotic damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a success. All non-creature organic material in the area, such as plants, wood, or food, begin to rot and wither.

monster.name: Soul-Snatching Aranea

resist.note: from attacks that aren't moongilded or silvered

languages: all languages any creatures whose souls it has eaten knew

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The aranea's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 17}). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Contorsion
entries: The aranea can move through a space as narrow as 5 inches wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Devour Soul
entries: The aranea can eat the soul of a creature it has killed within the last hour, provided the creature has one. The devouring requires the aranea to be within 5 feet of the corpse for at least 10 minutes, after which it gains a number of Hit Dice ({@dice d10|d10s}) equal to half the creature's Hit Dice. Roll those dice, and increase the aranea's current hit points and hit point maximum by the total. For every four Hit Dice the aranea gains in this way, its attacks deal an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) damage on a hit. The aranea retains these benefits for 7 days. A creature whose soul is devoured by the aranea can be restored to life only by a {@spell wish} spell.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the aranea is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the aranea instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Snatcher's Mimicry
entries: The aranea can perfectly imitate the voices of creatures whose souls it has devoured. The voice doesn't come from the aranea directly, echoing from its general direction instead. To discern the sound as unnatural and coming from the aranea, a creature can use its action to make a {@dc 17} {@skill Investigation} check to inspect it, locating the origin of the voice on a success.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The aranea can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The aranea ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

trait.name: Web Sense
entries: While in contact with a web, the aranea knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aranea makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its legs.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d10 + 4}) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0. In addition, the aranea regains hit points equal to half the damage dealt.

action.name: Leg
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Mimic Spell (3/Day)
entries: The aranea casts {@filter a spell of 5th level or lower with a verbal component and a casting time of 1 action|spells|source=|level=0;1;2;3;4;5|components & miscellaneous=verbal|cast time=action} it has heard cast within the last hour, without expending a spell slot or material components.

bonus.name: Skitter
entries: The aranea moves up to half its speed without provoking {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks}.

bonus.name: Web {@recharge 5}
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 30/60 ft., one creature. {@h}The target is {@condition restrained} by webbing. As an action, the {@condition restrained} target can make a {@dc 17} Strength check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; 20 hp; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

reaction.name: Yelp
entries: After a creature the aranea can see hits it with an attack, the aranea can yelp in pain in the voice of one of the attacker's loved ones. The attacker must make a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) psychic damage and can't target the aranea with any attacks or effects until the end of its turn.

items.name: Bites
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) piercing damage, or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer, and the swarm regains hit points equal to the damage dealt.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Librarian is a 13th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks). The Librarian has the following wizard spells prepared:
footerEntries: * {@cite Osteomancy Spells|SGttEH|Osteomancy spell} of 1st level or higher

trait.name: After Image
entries: The Librarian can only use this trait if it has been reduced to 0 hit points in the past hour. Whenever the Librarian casts an {@cite Osteomancy Spells|SGttEH|osteomancy spell} of 1st level or higher, it can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that it can see. It also becomes {@condition invisible} and projects an illusory image that makes it appear to be in its previous location until the start of its next turn. A creature that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful {@dc 17} {@skill Investigation} check. If a creature targets the illusion, it has the impression that the Librarian is magically absorbing the damage.

trait.name: Aura of Silence
entries: The Librarian has a permanent {@spell silence} spell cast on itself that moves with it; this aura doesn't prevent the Librarian from casting spells with a verbal component, and it can't be dispelled.

trait.name: Dark Devotion
entries: The Librarian has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened} or gaining madness.

trait.name: Erase Reality
entries: The Librarian can sense when any creature within 120 feet of it can see through illusions (such as with {@sense truesight}) and the Librarian has advantage on attack rolls against such creatures.

trait.name: Eternal Nightmare (1/Day)
entries: If the Librarian is reduced to 0 hit points, it doesn't die or fall {@condition unconscious}. Instead, it regains all its hit points and regains all its spell slots of 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 7th level.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage, or 4 ({@damage 1d8}) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

bonus.name: Nightmare Dash
entries: The librarian flies up to 30 feet in a straight line.

reaction.name: Spell Reflection
entries: When the Librarian succeeds on a saving throw against a spell, the spell is dispelled and the librarian gains a spell slot equal to the spell's level. This spell slot vanishes if the Librarian uses this reaction again or after 1 minute.

spellcasting.name: Misty Step
headerEntries: The King casts {@spell misty step}. Charisma is its spellcasting ability for the spell.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The King has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed}, and magic can't put the King to sleep.

trait.name: Great Cleave (3/Day)
entries: When the King makes a melee weapon attack, it can make another attack with the same weapon against each other creature within reach and within 5 feet of the original target as part of the same action.

trait.name: Leap Attack
entries: Once per turn, if the King moves at least 15 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a greatsword attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 6 ({@damage 1d12}) slashing damage.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (5/Day)
entries: If the King fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The King has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Reactive
entries: The King can take one reaction on every turn in combat.

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: The King has an {@item Unbound Épée Solaire|SGttEH} {@homebrew |(SGttEH page 256)}. The king can't be disarmed of it while it is conscious. The bonus to attack and damage rolls is already included in the stat block.

trait.name: Undying Warrior
entries: Having 0 hit points doesn't knock the King {@condition unconscious}. He must still make death saving throws, and suffers the normal effects of taking damage while at 0 hit points.

trait.name: Unstoppable
entries: The King's speed can't be reduced, but effects like being {@condition paralyzed} can still prevent it from moving.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The King makes three greatsword attacks, or four shortswords attacks if the {@item Unbound Épée Solaire|SGttEH} is transformed.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 19} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}32 ({@damage 6d6 + 11}) slashing damage and 4 ({@damage 1d8}) radiant damage. If the King damages a creature twice on a turn with this attack, the target must succeed on a {@dc 25} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened} of the King for 1 minute. A {@condition frightened} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 19} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d6 + 11}) slashing damage and 4 ({@damage 1d8}) radiant damage.

bonus.name: Hunter's Pursuit
entries: The King flies up to 70 feet toward a creature it can see without provoking {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks}.

bonus.name: Vicious Finisher (2/Day)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 16} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}138 ({@damage 20d12 + 8}) slashing damage. This attack scores a critical hit on a result of 15–20 on the die. The King can use this bonus action twice, once each when the King has fewer than half, and one-quarter its hit points.

reaction.name: Dodge Step
entries: When a creature the King can see attacks it, the King can move 5 feet without provoking {@action opportunity attack|PHB|opportunity attacks} and make a Dexterity saving throw with a DC equal to the attack roll's total. On a success, the King evades completely and the attack misses. On a failure, the King takes half the attack's damage if it hits it.

reaction.name: Killing Blow
entries: If the King sees a creature within its reach fall to 0 hit points, it can make an attack with its weapon against the creature. On a hit, the King pierces a vital organ and the target immediately dies.

reaction.name: Weapon Parry
entries: The King adds 8 to its AC against one attack that would hit it. To do so, the King must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon. If the attack is a ranged attack, the King can beckon gravity and force the attacker to make a {@dc 26} Strength saving throw, pulling it up to 60 feet straight towards the King on a failure. This reaction can't be used two turns in a row.

legendary.name: Enforced Duel
entries: The King magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Before teleporting, it can force a creature that it can see within 120 feet of it to make a {@dc 26} Charisma saving throw. On a failure, the target is teleported to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the King's destination.

legendary.name: Strike
entries: The King makes a greatsword attack or two shortsword attacks, depending on which form its weapon is in.

legendary.name: Mark of the Hunt (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The King marks its prey for death. Each creature of its choice in a 300 feet of it that it can see must succeed on a {@dc 26} Charisma saving throw or be branded for 1 minute. The King gain a +7 bonus to damage rolls against branded targets. Any attack roll the King makes against a branded target is a critical hit on a roll of 18–20 on the {@dice d20}. If a branded target dies, the King regains 30 hit points. The brand can be removed via a {@spell remove curse} spell or similar effect.

immune.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't moongilded

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Tisiphone is a 14th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 18}, {@hit 10} to hit with spell attacks). Tisiphone has the following druid spells prepared:

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
entries: Tisiphone has advantage on {@skill Perception} checks that rely on hearing or sight.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
entries: If Tisiphone fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Natural Resistance
entries: Tisiphone has advantage on saving throws against spells, other magical effects, and effects that would knock her {@condition prone}.

trait.name: Primal Resurrection
entries: When Tisiphone is reduced to 0 hit points, her orb of truth absorbs her essence. The orb of truth has an AC of 20, 50 hit points, a flying speed of 60 feet, the same resistances and immunities as Tisiphone, and is {@condition invisible}. It must reach Tisiphone's circle within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in the circle, it releases Tisiphone with 0 hit points and she is {@condition paralyzed} until she regains at least 1 hit point. After spending 1 hour in her circle in this way, she regains 1 hit point. If the orb is destroyed before reaching the circle, Tisiphone is also destroyed.

trait.name: Primeval Power
entries: Tisiphone's weapon attacks are magical and deal additional damage equal to her Wisdom modifier on a hit (included in the stat block).

trait.name: Violent Regeneration
entries: Tisiphone regains 18 hit points at the start of her turn if she has at least 1 hit point. In addition, whenever she takes damage, each creature of her choice within 5 feet of her takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) piercing damage as her bark explodes.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Tisiphone makes two staff attacks. She can cast a spell of 4th level or lower in place of one attack.

action.name: Staff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 2d8 + 10}) bludgeoning damage and Tisiphone gains temporary hit points equal to the damage dealt.

bonus.name: Orb of Truth
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 10} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) acid, bludgeoning, cold, or poison damage (Tisiphone's choice).

legendary.name: Staff
entries: Tisiphone makes one staff attack.

legendary.name: Cast Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Tisiphone casts a spell of 4th level or lower.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Hunter's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 15}). The Hunter can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Eldritch Mask
entries: The Hunter's mask is the source of its power. The mask has AC 22 and 25 hit points. The mask is immune to all damage except bludgeoning, fire, force, piercing, and slashing damage and it doesn't take damage from effects that target an area. While the Hunter is wearing its mask, it has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, can cast {@spell speak with animals} and {@spell Speak with Plants|PHB|plants} at will, and can't be {@condition deafened} or magically put to sleep. If the mask is destroyed, it loses these benefits.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
entries: If the Hunter fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Treestep
entries: Once on its turn, the Hunter can use 10 feet of its movement to step magically into one living tree within its reach and emerge from a second living tree within 60 feet of the first tree, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the second tree. Both trees must be Large or bigger. After using this trait, the hunter gains the benefits of the {@spell barkskin} spell until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Hunter makes two attacks: one with its gravetouch and one with its maggotspit.

action.name: Gravetouch
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 6d6 + 4}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Maggotspit
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 8d4 + 4}) poison damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute. A {@condition poisoned} creature can repeat this saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

action.name: Rootprison {@recharge 4}
entries: The Hunter chooses up to five creatures within 30 feet of a tree the Hunter can see. Each creature must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) piercing damage and is {@condition restrained} for 1 minute. Whenever a {@condition restrained} creature uses its action to make an {@action attack} or {@action cast a spell}, it takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) piercing damage. A creature can use its action to make a {@dc 15} {@skill Athletics} check to break itself or another creature within its reach free, ending the effect on that creature on a success.

action.name: Wooden Labyrinth
entries: The Hunter chooses a creature it can see within 120 feet of it. The target must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature becomes magically lost, automatically failing all {@skill Nature} and {@skill Survival} checks it makes for the next 24 hours and being unable to escape the woods. The creature isn't aware of this effect. On a success, the creature is immune to this effect for the next 24 hours and knows it was targeted by some sort of magic.

bonus.name: They Have Eyes
entries: The Hunter transport its senses into any tree within 500 miles of it that it has seen, seeing and hearing as if it occupied the tree's space, until it ends the effect (no action required). During this time, it is {@condition blinded|PHB|blind} and {@condition deafened|PHB|deaf} in regard to its own senses.

reaction.name: House of Leaves (3/Day)
entries: When the Hunter is hit by an attack, it turns into a pile of leaves and reappears in the branches of a tree within 60 feet of it, causing the attack to miss.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Vicar Priscilla is an 11th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 18}, {@hit 10} to hit with spell attacks). Vicar Priscilla has the following cleric spells prepared:

trait.name: Divine Warrior
entries: Vicar Priscilla's weapon attacks deal an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) radiant damage on a hit (included in the attacks).

trait.name: Honed Reflexes
entries: Vicar Priscilla can take two reactions per round, but no more than one reaction per turn.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Vicar Priscilla fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Vicar Priscilla has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Vicar Priscilla has a {@item Shard of Moonlight|SGttEH} {@homebrew |(SGttEH page 252)}. She cannot be disarmed of it while she is conscious.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Vicar Priscilla makes two Shard of Moonlight attacks.

action.name: Shard of Moonlight
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) radiant damage, or 12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) radiant damage if the blade is transformed.

bonus.name: Divine Dash
entries: Vicar Priscilla moves up to 40 feet in a straight line.

legendary.name: Beckon the Moon
entries: Vicar Priscilla raises the Shard of Moonlight at the moon and the blade gains or loses 3 ({@dice 1d4 + 1}) charges, according to Vicar Priscilla's will.

legendary.name: Strike
entries: Vicar Priscilla makes a Shard of Moonlight attack.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Vicar Priscilla casts a spell she has prepared.

legendary.name: Vanish (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Vicar Priscilla expends 5 charges from her Shard of Moonlight to step into the Ethereal Plane until the start of her next turn.

trait.name: Wispfather
entries: While within 60 feet of the liege, a {@creature will-o'-wisp}, can use its shock attack an additional time on each of its turns as a bonus action.

trait.name: Dying Whisper
entries: Whenever a {@creature will-o'-wisp} is reduced to 0 hit points within 60 feet of the liege, the liege regains 5 hit points and gains advantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The liege uses its Create Wisps (if available), then makes two attacks with its claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) slashing damage plus 1 slashing damage for each {@creature will-o'-wisp} within 5 feet of the target.

action.name: Create Wisps {@recharge}
entries: The liege opens its mouth to let out {@dice 1d4} {@creature will-o'-wisp|MM|will-o'-wisps}. They share its initiative, but take their turn immediately after the liege's. The liege can command them telepathically (no action required by the liege), and they will follow its commands.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The zealot is a 5th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to hit with spell attacks). The zealot has the following cleric spells prepared:

trait.name: Call to Radiance
entries: As a bonus action, the zealot can expend a spell slot to magically imbue its weapons with divine power. Until the end of the turn, its melee weapon attacks deal an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) radiant damage on a hit. If the zealot expends a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the extra damage increases by {@dice 1d6} for each level above 1st.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage.
